7 
8 #pragma once
9 
10 #include "MWCaptureDef.h"
11 
12 #pragma warning(push)
13 #pragma warning(disable : 4201)
14 #include <ks.h>
15 #pragma warning(pop)
16 
17 #pragma pack(push)
18 #pragma pack(1)
19 
21 // Magewell Capture Private Extensions
22 
23 typedef enum _MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_EXTENSION_PRIVATE {
24  // HDCP
25  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_HDCP_SUPPORT = 0x20000000, // V, G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_BOOL
26 
27  // Activation
28  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_ACTIVATION_ID = 0x40000000, // V, G, Prop: MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_DWORD_S, Data: MWCAP_ACTIVATION_ID
29  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_ACTIVATION_CODE = 0x40000001, // V, S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_ACTIVATION_CODE
30  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_ACTIVATION_PROTECT = 0x40000002, // V, S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_ACTIVATION_PROTECT
31  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_ACTIVATION_STATE = 0x40000003, // V, G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_ACTIVATION_STATE
32 
33  // Read DS28E01 data
34  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_SECURITY_DATA = 0x40000004, // V, G, Prop: MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_DWORD_S, Data: BYTE[]
35 
36  // Diagnoise
37  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_I2C_REGISTER = 0x40000005, // V, G/S, Prop: MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_I2C_S, Data: BYTE[]
38  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_MCB_REGISTER = 0x40000006, // V, G/S, Prop: MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_DWORD_S, Data: DWORD
39  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_GSPI_REGISTER = 0x40000007, // V, G/S, Prop: MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_GSPI_S, Data: WORD
40 
41  // Write DS28E01 data
42  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_USER_SECURITY_DATA = 0x40000008 // V, G/S, Prop: MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_USER_SECURITY_DATA_S, Data: BYTE[]
43 } MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_EXTENSION_PRIVATE;
44 
45 // Activation
46 typedef struct _MWCAP_ACTIVATION_ID {
47  WORD wProductID;
48  DWORD dwDNALow;
49  DWORD dwDNAHigh;
50 } MWCAP_ACTIVATION_ID;
51 
52 typedef struct _MWCAP_ACTIVATION_CODE {
53  BYTE abySecretKey[8];
54  BYTE abySecretData[8];
55  BYTE abyActivationCode[8];
56  char achSerialNo[16];
57 } MWCAP_ACTIVATION_CODE;
58 
59 typedef struct _MWCAP_ACTIVATION_PORTECT {
60  BYTE abySecretKey[8];
61 } MWCAP_ACTIVATION_PROTECT;
62 
63 typedef enum _MWCAP_ACTIVATION_STATE {
64  MWCAP_ACTIVATION_INIT,
65  MWCAP_ACTIVATION_OK,
66  MWCAP_ACTIVATION_DEAD
67 } MWCAP_ACTIVATION_STATE;
68 
69 typedef struct _MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_I2C_S {
70  KSPROPERTY Property;
71  int iChannel;
72  BYTE byDevAddr;
73  BYTE byRegAddr;
74 } MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_I2C_S;
75 
76 typedef struct _MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_GSPI_S {
77  KSPROPERTY Property;
78  DWORD dwChipSelects;
79  WORD wRegAddr;
80 } MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_GSPI_S;
81 
82 typedef struct _MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_USER_SECURITY_DATA_S {
83  KSPROPERTY Property;
84  BYTE abySecretKey[8]; // Not used for GET
85  WORD wOffset;
86 } MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_USER_SECURITY_DATA_S;
87 
88 #pragma pack(pop)
